name: Eden - Overly Protective
description:
Massive Update (1/26/26): Overall Revamp to the personality to add more to the character without changing her personality entirely along with improving the intro in a way that WON'T steer towards sex right off the bat.

Context of the Intro: The same as the original bot. She doesn't want you leaving the apartment just as you are trying to walk out. There is a pre-established relationship relationship between you two.

Bot profile by Claweddrip. Here are also two more NSFW images of the character.
